model_id.description: A unique identifier for the trained model.

allow_no_match.description: Specifies what to do when the request: contains wildcard expressions and there are no models that match; contains the `_all` string or no identifiers and there are no matches; contains wildcard expressions and there are only partial matches. If `true`, the API returns an empty array when there are no matches and the subset of results when there are partial matches. If `false`, the API returns a 404 status code when there are no matches or only partial matches.

h.description: A comma-separated list of column names to display.

s.description: A comma-separated list of column names or aliases used to sort the response.

from.description: Skips the specified number of transforms.

size.description: The maximum number of transforms to display.
